title: eriogonum latifolium var. harfordii
intro: Eriogonum latifolium var. harfordii, also known as Harford's buckwheat, is a plant species in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae) native to California in the United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Harford's buckwheat include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health concerns. Eriogonum latifolium var. harfordii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it easily accessible for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
